profile.name: Saranya T
profile.title: Computer Science Engineering Student
profile.tagline: AI & Data Science | Building data-driven solutions for real-world problems
profile.summary: Computer Science Engineering student at Rajalakshmi Institute of Technology (CGPA: 9.22) with strong expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Analytics, and Web Development. Experienced through 9+ internships, multiple projects, research, and hackathons. Winner of a National-Level Hackathon, Best Paper Award recipient, and Top Performer across internship programs. Passionate about building AI-driven solutions to solve real-world problems.
